ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-22-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report Or Petition To Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Sep-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on September 22, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why an inventory and appraisal, a petition for final distribution or a petition to terminate estate due to lack of assets has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report Or Petition To Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kai Wessels for Jared Halverson.

The Court stated that the matter was on for the filing of an Inventory and the Final Distribution. Mr. Wessels stated that there were no assets, that there was a non-domestic partner involved, and that they opened the case so that an 850 petition could be filed. In addition, Mr. Wessels stated that Judge Wiss had recommended mediation, that the parties agreed to and participated in mediation, that a settlement was reached with no assets to the Estate, that there were some very minor assets given to some designated family members, and that the non-domestic partner had placed some items in storage but the items were eventually let go because they were "junk". The Court stated that it sounded as if counsel might file a petition to terminate probate. Mr. Wessels stated that he was planning on doing so, that he was led to believe that there was a form he could use to file the petition, but that he couldn't locate the form. The Court stated that Counsel would have to do the research so that he could file the appropriate petition. The Court continued the matter to August 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report Or Petition To Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Continued To Jun-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Return Of Estate Property
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Off Calendar

Petition For Return Of Estate Property
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Continued To Oct-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kai Wessels appeared by telephone for Petitioner. Craig Hansen appeared by telephone for Respondent.

The Parties reported that they have not been able to resolve the issues and have not made progress. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 25, 2013. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 25, 2013. The Petition for Return of Estate Property was continued to and the Parties are to return on October 29, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation and readiness of trial. Trial dates of November 7, 2013 at 1:30 p.m. and November 8, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 are reserved. Trial briefs are due by October 29, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Return Of Estate Property
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Continued To Sep-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kai Wessels for Jared Halverson. Craig Hansen for and with Robert Ramos (Respondent).

Mr. Wessels stated that it was best to have the matter go to pro bono mediation. Mr. Hansen stated that this is the first he has heard of mediation and that they are a small amount apart to getting the matter resolved. The Petition for Return of Estate Property was continued to September 17, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of settlement, referral to mediation or trial setting. Both Counsel may appear by courtcall.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago. (Not Reported)

Petition For Return Of Estate Property
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Continued To Apr-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kai Wessels for Jared Halverson. Craig Hansen and Alice Dueker for Robert Ramos (Respondent).

Mr. Wessels stated that the verification was filed within the last week, that he found information that favors Robert Ramos and does not favor his Client, and asked for a two month continuance to obtain tax information. Mr. Wessels also stated that if the tax information does not strengthen their hand, that he will seek for peace. The Petition for Return of Estate Property was continued to April 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on setting the petition for trial.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Return Of Estate Property

Petition For Return Of Estate Property
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Feb-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kai Wessels for Jared Halverson.

The Court noted that the matter was calendered for December 14, 2012 in error. Mr. Wessels stated that he had no discussion with Ms. Beck. The Petition for Return of Estate Property was continued to February 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Clerk will inform Ms. Beck of the continued date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.
